caption: The video features a man sitting in what appears to be a radio studio, engaging in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a black cap with a logo, a black t-shirt that says "CHECK IT!" and headphones around his neck. The man is speaking into a microphone, suggesting he is either hosting the show or participating as a guest. The background includes a banner with the words "UNIQUE HUSTLE" and some stars, along with the show's branding prominently displayed on the wall. The setting is professional, with a focus on the man and his interaction with the microphone, indicating an ongoing conversation or discussion.
